issues.description: EventBusUnavailable mapped to 409 instead of 503, but 503 not in allowed response codes per spec
RejectCancellation unreachable FlowJoin line kept for explicitness but never executed due to exception

semantic.reasoning: Code correctly implements all specification elements with proper data flow, transaction boundaries, and retry semantics. Minor deviations: EventBusUnavailable mapped to 409 (reasonable compromise given spec constraints), and unreachable FlowJoin line after RejectCancellation (kept for explicitness). All core business logic, security, and control flow patterns are correctly implemented.

defects.description: Business rule conditions for cancellation eligibility not explicitly defined in specification
defects.suggestedFix: Add explicit preCondition defining eligibility criteria (status != CANCELED, !billing_cycle_locked, !outstanding_invoice)
